query:
SELECT 
  s.name as store_name,
  COUNT(*) as total_products,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.description IS NULL OR p.description = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_desc
FROM products p
JOIN stores s ON p.store_id = s.id
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
ORDER BY missing_desc DESC;
command:

  COUNT(*) as total_products,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.description IS NULL OR p.description = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_desc
FROM products p
JOIN stores s ON p.store_id = s.id
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
ORDER BY missing_desc DESC;
